summary: Comprehensive testing of Zen Energy Bar app completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (11/11 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working excellently with successful auth flow, page navigation, and API integration. Minor UI interaction issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Practice shortcut buttons not fully functional
Journal text input not easily accessible or visible

design_issues.issue: No proper 404 error page for non-existent routes

passed_tests: Meditation page loads with timer elements
Exercises page shows Qigong and Tai Chi items
Nourishment page displays 8 items with filters
Frequencies page shows 12 frequency cards with Hz values
Soundscapes page loads with sound controls
Auth flow - successful login and dashboard redirect
Responsive design on mobile and tablet viewports
AI features (exercise guide, nourishment suggestions) functional

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (core functionality excellent, minor UI interaction issues)
